data.definition: Stock ticker symbol for the issuer workspace.
Business date represented by the imported data.
Timestamp when the file was copied or normalized into import_data.
Human-readable source note for this normalized file.
Expected data provider or platform.
Semantic type of the JSON file.
Number of top-level records in the data payload.
Legal or display name of the issuer.
Market capitalization.
Total shares outstanding.
Estimated freely tradable public float.
Institutional, activist, or insider name.
Percent of issuer owned by holder.
Absolute change in share position.
Short interest as a percent of free float.
Average cost to borrow across lending data.
Shares available to short.
Short interest divided by average daily volume.
Options put/call ratio.
Estimated option gamma exposure.
Number of trades or prints.
FINRA weekly volume quantity.
SEC form type such as 13F, 13D, 13G, 8-K, or Form 4.
Normalized alert rule/event identifier.
Alert priority for portal display.
Social platform where a company mention was found.
Public handle or author name for a social mention.
Timestamp when a social mention was published.
Positive, negative, or neutral classification for a mention.
0-100 score estimating tone of a mention.
Primary theme detected in a mention.
Text excerpt from the imported mention.
URL pointing back to the original public post.
Imported engagement count for the mention.
Official public free float from public market data or provider-derived capital structure data.
Internal management estimate of tradable float after subtracting locked, tokenized, long-term held, and unavailable-for-trading shares from official free float.
Internal management estimate of lendable float after subtracting shares unavailable for lending, tokenized shares, and locked shares from official free float.
Shares known by management to be controlled by executives, founders, directors, affiliated entities, treasury-related structures, or major shareholders.
Shares marked as tokenized, pending tokenization, locked on-chain, or removed from broker lending pool in manual internal inputs.
Manual-input shares estimated to be unavailable for active trading due to restriction, lock-up, tokenization, long-term hold, or similar status.
Manual-input shares estimated to be unavailable for securities lending.
Official short interest divided by estimated real tradable float.
Official short interest divided by estimated real lendable float.
Percentage reduction from official free float to estimated real tradable float.
Percentage reduction from official free float to estimated real lendable float.
Management-provided confidence level for a manual internal holding: High, Medium, or Low.

Origin of the internal ownership information, such as personally controlled, transfer agent record, trust structure, custodian statement, tokenized wallet, internal estimate, known friendly holder, legal record, or other.
System-calculated holder share percentage equal to holder shares divided by official shares outstanding times 100.
